# CLAUDE.md — Grafana AirGradient Dashboard

## Project Overview

Grafana dashboard for AirGradient ONE indoor air quality monitoring with bathroom extractor state tracking.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/grafana-airgradient-dashboard](https://github.com/GeiserX/grafana-airgradient-dashboard)
- **Language:** JSON
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
